subcodes.first_line: O trustworthy one, your letter dated 5 Ramadan 1339 was received and carefully perused. For several days [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: جناب امین نامه شما که بتاریخ ۵ رمضان ۱۳۳۹ بود رسید و بدقت ملاحظه گشت چند روز
subcodes.subjects: @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
